reviews.review_description: I actually liked this game and I've finished it. It was so  relaxing and soothing but then I come on here hoping to see new updates and there never are any. Please update this game!! 🙏🙏
No use full height adjustments. No snap turn etc. needs a lot of work. Has potential.

Needs a lot of work. This could be such a good game but the lack of recent reviews or info about updates makes me think it's going to be one of those games that gets into App Lab and becomes too much of a hassle to maintain or update. 

There is no teleport. It's all smooth motion. Which is really not good if you get motion sickness. Teleport should always be an option.

Controls are clumsy and if you drop the water gun or anything on the ground, there's no way to pick it up for some weird reason. I had to close the game and start again because reaching to the ground did not retrieve the items that fell.

You should not have to go back to the station to pick a nozzle or foam. They should be cycled through with the thumbstick or button. All the moving around to change nozzles is really a pain. 

You have no idea when the car is fully washed. No indicator that you're done or how far along you are. Trying to grip the wax and waxer was frustrating. Dropped the can of wax, had to quit out of the game to retrieve it.

You cannot play sitting down, which is a mistake. 

These types of games are usually a very zen type experience but this one is just too frustrating to navigate.

It's a simplistic game that accomplishes what it sets out to do. It's a nice calm and fun time in an environment that feels good to be in. Unlock upgrades and tools along the way for more fun! There are minor improvements and additions that could be made to add to immersion such as a touch screen and tool holster instead of the floating bubbles in the air. If it were possible, seeing the sections of the car that you finish sparkle would really help too with letting the player know they can move on! Thank you for the fun game!
the game is oddly satisfying!! never thought i would like washing this much!! Kudos to the dev

developer_response.body: Thank you for review :) We working hard for better experience

reviews.review_description: I got the game everything going well the whole car cleaned and there's still some cracks that won't clean no matter what and I can't finish it without them maybe devs cut a bit of slack and let us do not spotless if not fixed I'm gonna refund sorry

developer_response.body: Hello. We are sorry for the problem you are experiencing. We would be very happy if you could send an e-mail to support@fragilent.com for the details of the problem you are experiencing.

reviews.review_description: I rate it a four because I don’t know how to pass the tutorial

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. Actually only tutorial in game is UI tutorial. It can close with close button. After that you can see tips on upper on screen. If you have any question please contact with us support@fragilent.com :)
